title: Leadership Development Workshop
summary: Cadets will participate in team-building exercises and leadership activities focused on communication, responsibility, and problem-solving skills.

title: Regional Drill Meet
summary: The Drill Team will compete against regional programs in regulation, exhibition, and color guard events.

title: Veterans Day Parade
summary: Cadets will participate in the annual Veterans Day Parade to honor local veterans and represent Palmetto Coast High Leadership Academy in the community.
